We showcase their efficacy by predicting off-state breakdown voltage (BV_\mathrm DS,off) and specific on-resistance (R_\mathrm sp) of a laterally diffused metal oxide semiconductor field-effect transistor (LDMOSFET). Our findings highlight the potential for ~38% reduction in training dataset size while maintaining a strong predictive baseline accuracy. Specifically, the diverse representative-query by committee (DR-QBC) technique works best yielding ~6.5% Euclidean norm of prediction error (ENPE). We also demonstrate an inverse design framework by leveraging the same surrogate model with differential evolution (DE) and Bayesian optimizer (BO). It mimics the role of a device design engineer by optimizing the values of structural parameters of the LDMOS transistors such that the desired BV_\mathrm DS,off is attained while minimizing R_\mathrm sp .
items.abstract_zh: 过去十年来，使用机器学习的设备设计已在半导体行业得到应用。然而，使用这种技术生成用于精确预测的训练数据集仍然很繁重。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了八种样本高效技术来训练基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的代理模型，以模拟计算机辅助设计 (TCAD) 技术。我们通过预测断态击穿电压 (BV_\mathrm DS,off) 和特定值来展示其功效横向扩散金属氧化物半导体场效应晶体管的导通电阻 (R_\mathrm sp) （LDMOSFET）。我们的研究结果强调了训练数据集大小有可能减少约 38%，同时保持强大的预测基线准确性。具体来说，委员会的多样化代表性查询 (DR-QBC) 技术效果最好，产生约 6.5% 的欧几里得范数预测误差 (ENPE)。我们还通过利用具有差分进化（DE）和贝叶斯优化器（BO）的相同代理模型来演示逆向设计框架。它通过优化 LDMOS 晶体管的结构参数值来模仿器件设计工程师的角色，从而获得所需的 BV_\mathrm DS,off 是在最小化 R_\mathrm sp 时获得的。

items.title: PHIMO-NN: Compact Modeling by Fusing Device Physics and Neural Networks for One-Shot Parameterization.
items.abstract: The complexity of compact device modeling has grown significantly in advanced technologies, including an increase in the number of model parameters, the time-consuming process of parameter extraction, and significant efforts required for model updating with device technology evolutions. To address these challenges, a new methodology by fusing device physics and tiny neural networks (PHIMO-NN) is developed. With the capability of neural networks in the universal approximation to assist compact modeling, e.g., replacing manual fitting functions and/or binning equations, the number of model parameters is reduced while a global coverage is achieved. The well-behaved derivatives of PHIMO-NN outputs to its parameters lead to a desired one-shot parameterization using a backpropagation (BP) training. For FinFET technology data of a 14/16 nm process design kit (PDK) model comprising five bins covering the entire gate lengths, PHIMO-NN parameterization takes 20 min, resulting in a significant speedup compared with traditional model extractions. Further, model transferring for technology updates is made easier with the continuous learning capability. For example, a PHIMO-NN trained for FinFETs with an error of 0.22% is easily extended for nanosheet gate-all-around FET with an error of 0.31%. PHIMO-NN combines the advantages of physics-based models (physics-awareness and simplicity) and AI models (parameterization efficiency and accuracy), promising an agile device modeling methodology for advanced/emerging technologies.
items.abstract_zh: 在先进技术中，紧凑型设备建模的复杂性显着增加，包括模型参数数量的增加、参数提取过程的耗时以及随着设备技术的发展而更新模型所需的大量工作。为了应对这些挑战，开发了一种融合设备物理和微型神经网络（PHIMO-NN）的新方法。利用万能逼近中的神经网络协助紧凑建模的能力，例如，取代手动拟合函数和/或分箱方程，在实现全局覆盖的同时减少了模型参数的数量。 PHIMO-NN 输出对其参数的良好导数导致使用反向传播 (BP) 训练实现所需的一次性参数化。对于包含覆盖整个栅极长度的五个箱的 14/16 nm 工艺设计套件 (PDK) 模型的 FinFET 技术数据，PHIMO-NN 参数化需要 20 分钟，与传统模型提取相比，速度显着提升。此外，通过持续学习能力，技术更新的模型转移变得更加容易。例如，针对误差为 0.22% 的 FinFET 训练的 PHIMO-NN 可以轻松扩展到误差为 0.31% 的纳米片环栅 FET。 PHIMO-NN 结合了基于物理的模型（物理意识和简单性）和 AI 模型（参数化效率和准确性）的优点，为先进/新兴技术提供了敏捷的设备建模方法。

items.title: Modular Functional Test Sequences for Test Compaction.
items.abstract: Ensuring correct functional operation of a chip requires extensive testing. Without the constraints of maintaining functional operation conditions, structural (scan-based) tests allow high-fault coverage to be achieved efficiently. To cover defects that are only exhibited under functional operation conditions, functional test sequences are used for complementing scan-based tests. One of the limitations of functional test sequences is their length, making it important to apply test compaction. To avoid losing the functional properties of a sequence when test compaction is applied at the gate level, design-for-testability (DFT) logic can be used for keeping the circuit in its functional state space. In this context, this article suggests the new concept of a modular functional test sequence consisting of subsequences that can be plugged in or out to increase the fault coverage or reduce the sequence length. To support modularity at the gate level, DFT logic is used for restoring functional states between subsequences. Modularity offers the key advantage that a single compact functional test sequence can be constructed from a given pool of functional test sequences, and the modular sequence can be updated as additional sequences become available in the pool, or additional fault models are targeted. The article develops a procedure for the generation and compaction of modular sequences using subsequences from a given pool, and presents experimental results for benchmark circuits in an academic simulation environment to demonstrate its effectiveness and limitations.
items.abstract_zh: 确保芯片正确的功能运行需要大量的测试。在不受维持功能操作条件的限制的情况下，结构（基于扫描）测试可以有效地实现高故障覆盖率。为了覆盖仅在功能操作条件下出现的缺陷，功能测试序列用于补充基于扫描的测试。功能测试序列的限制之一是其长度，因此应用测试压缩非常重要。为了避免在门级应用测试压缩时丢失序列的功能属性，可使用可测试性设计 (DFT) 逻辑将电路保持在其功能状态空间中。在此背景下，本文提出了模块化功能测试序列的新概念，该序列由可以插入或拔出的子序列组成，以增加故障覆盖率或减少序列长度。为了支持门级的模块化，使用 DFT 逻辑来恢复子序列之间的功能状态。模块化提供了一个关键优势，即可以从给定的功能测试序列池构建单个紧凑的功能测试序列，并且可以随着池中的附加序列可用或针对附加故障模型来更新模块化序列。本文开发了一种使用给定池中的子序列生成和压缩模块化序列的程序，并提供了学术模拟环境中基准电路的实验结果，以证明其有效性和局限性。

items.title: Reverse Steepening of a Fault Coverage Curve.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art technologies exhibit a variety of defects requiring test sets that detect a variety of fault models. Such a test set is large, and tests at the end of the test set detect small numbers of additional faults. Procedures that steepen the fault coverage curve help address constraints on test application time and test data volume of large test sets. Existing steepening procedures move tests detecting more faults to earlier positions of the test set. Such procedures are referred to as forward steepening procedures. This article takes a complementary view that results in a reverse steepening procedure. The procedure moves tests detecting fewer additional faults to later positions. Indirectly, it causes tests detecting more faults to appear in earlier positions. Experimental results for benchmark circuits in an academic simulation environment demonstrate the effectiveness of the reverse steepening procedure as a standalone procedure, and as part of a procedure that reduces the test data volume without reducing the fault coverage.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的技术表现出各种缺陷，需要测试装置来检测各种故障模型。这样的测试集很大，并且测试集末尾的测试检测到少量的附加故障。使故障覆盖曲线变陡的过程有助于解决大型测试集的测试应用时间和测试数据量的限制。现有的陡化程序将检测更多故障的测试移动到测试集的较早位置。这种过程被称为向前陡化过程。本文采取了一种互补的观点，导致了反向陡化过程。该过程将检测到较少额外故障的测试移至稍后的位置。间接地，它会导致检测到更多故障的测试出现在较早的位置。学术模拟环境中基准电路的实验结果证明了反向陡化过程作为独立过程以及作为减少测试数据量而不减少故障覆盖率的过程的一部分的有效性。

items.title: eBrainISA: Edge-Oriented Instruction Set Architecture for Hybrid Brain-Inspired Computing.
items.abstract: Hybrid brain-inspired computing (BIC), which integrates computer science-oriented artificial neural networks (ANNs) with neuroscience-oriented spiking neural networks (SNNs), represents a significant trend in the field of BIC. This approach demonstrates considerable advantages in domains, such as perception, cognition, and learning. Nevertheless, several challenges persist in deploying hybrid BIC on resource-constrained edge devices, particularly in enabling these devices to effectively manage complex tasks. To tackle these challenges, we present eBrainISA, an edge-oriented hybrid BIC instruction set architecture (ISA). eBrainISA is designed to support sophisticated ANNs, SNNs, and hybrid neural networks (HNNs), which integrates an extensive suite of neural operators that are tailored to accommodate the hardware limitations on edge devices. To validate the proposed architecture, we develop a unified low-precision quantization approach alongside a hardware simulator. Prior ISAs offer limited support for hybrid BIC, while ours can support all major networks, including ANNs such as ResNet and Yolo, SNNs such as Spike_ResNet and Spike_Transformer, and HNNs such as DetectHNN and ReSpike with <1% accuracy degradation. Moreover, our architecture achieves about 5× memory saving compared to full-precision versions and 3.87× – 53.61× higher energy efficiency compared to edge GPU when executing different neural networks with diverse behaviors. This work demonstrates a promising balance between intelligent demands for general models and resource constraints on edge devices.
items.abstract_zh: 混合类脑计算（BIC）将面向计算机科学的人工神经网络（ANN）与面向神经科学的尖峰神经网络（SNN）集成在一起，代表了BIC领域的一个重要趋势。这种方法在感知、认知和学习等领域表现出相当大的优势。然而，在资源有限的边缘设备上部署混合 BIC 仍然存在一些挑战，特别是在使这些设备能够有效管理复杂任务方面。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 eBrainISA，一种面向边缘的混合 BIC 指令集架构 (ISA)。 eBrainISA 旨在支持复杂的 ANN、SNN 和混合神经网络 (HNN)，它集成了广泛的神经运算符套件，这些运算符经过定制以适应边缘设备的硬件限制。为了验证所提出的架构，我们开发了一种统一的低精度量化方法以及硬件模拟器。之前的 ISA 对混合 BIC 提供有限的支持，而我们的 ISA 可以支持所有主要网络，包括 ResNet 和 Yolo 等 ANN、Spike_ResNet 和 Spike_Transformer 等 SNN，以及 DetectHNN 和 ReSpike 等 HNN，精度下降 $3.87\times $ – 53.61× 在执行具有不同行为的不同神经网络时，与边缘 GPU 相比，能源效率更高。这项工作展示了通用模型的智能需求和边缘设备的资源限制之间的良好平衡。

items.title: NeFT: Negative Feedback Training to Improve Robustness of Compute-in-Memory DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Compute-in-memory accelerators built upon nonvolatile memory devices excel in energy efficiency and latency when performing deep neural network (DNN) inference, thanks to their in-situ data processing capability. However, the stochastic nature and intrinsic variations of nonvolatile memory devices often result in performance degradation during DNN inference. Introducing these nonideal device behaviors in DNN training enhances robustness, but drawbacks include limited accuracy improvement, reduced prediction confidence, and convergence issues. This arises from a mismatch between the deterministic training and nondeterministic device variations, as such training, though considering variations, relies solely on the model’s final output. In this work, inspired by control theory, we propose negative feedback training (NeFT)—a novel concept supported by theoretical analysis—to more effectively capture the multiscale noisy information throughout the network. We instantiate this concept with two specific instances, oriented variational forward (OVF) and intermediate representation snapshot (IRS). Based on device variation models extracted from measured data, extensive experiments show that our NeFT outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods with up to a 45.08% improvement in inference accuracy while reducing epistemic uncertainty, boosting output confidence, and improving convergence probability. These results underline the generality and practicality of our NeFT framework for increasing the robustness of DNNs against device variations. The source code for these two instances is available at https://github.com/YifanQin-ND/NeFT_CIM .
items.abstract_zh: 基于非易失性存储设备构建的内存计算加速器在执行深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理时，凭借其原位数据处理能力，在能源效率和延迟方面表现出色。然而，非易失性存储设备的随机性和内在变化通常会导致 DNN 推理过程中的性能下降。在 DNN 训练中引入这些非理想设备行为可以增强鲁棒性，但缺点包括精度提升有限、预测置信度降低和收敛问题。这是由于确定性训练和非确定性设备变化之间的不匹配造成的，因为此类训练虽然考虑了变化，但仅依赖于模型的最终输出。在这项工作中，受控制理论的启发，我们提出了负反馈训练（NeFT）——一个由理论分析支持的新概念——以更有效地捕获整个网络中的多尺度噪声信息。我们用两个特定实例来实例化这个概念：面向变分前向（OVF）和中间表示快照（IRS）。基于从测量数据中提取的设备变化模型，大量实验表明，我们的 NeFT 优于现有最先进的方法，推理精度提高了 45.08%，同时减少了认知不确定性，提高了输出置信度，并提高了收敛概率。这些结果强调了我们的 NeFT 框架的通用性和实用性，可提高 DNN 针对设备变化的鲁棒性。这两个实例的源代码位于 https://github.com/YifanQin-ND/NeFT_CIM 。

items.title: SHyPar: A Spectral Coarsening Approach to Hypergraph Partitioning.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art hypergraph partitioners utilize a multilevel paradigm to construct progressively coarser hypergraphs across multiple layers, guiding cut refinements at each level of the hierarchy. Traditionally, these partitioners employ heuristic methods for coarsening and do not consider the structural features of hypergraphs. In this work, we introduce a multilevel spectral framework, SHyPar, for partitioning large-scale hypergraphs by leveraging hyperedge effective resistances and flow-based community detection techniques. Inspired by the latest theoretical spectral clustering frameworks, such as HyperEF and HyperSF, SHyPar aims to decompose large hypergraphs into multiple subgraphs with few interpartition hyperedges (cut size). A key component of SHyPar is a flow-based local clustering scheme for hypergraph coarsening, which incorporates a max-flow-based algorithm to produce clusters with substantially improved conductance. Additionally, SHyPar utilizes an effective resistance-based rating function for merging nodes that are strongly connected (coupled). Compared with existing state-of-the-art hypergraph partitioning methods, our extensive experimental results on real-world VLSI designs demonstrate that SHyPar can more effectively partition hypergraphs, achieving state-of-the-art solution quality.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的超图分区器利用多级范式跨多个层构建逐渐粗糙的超图，指导层次结构每个级别的切割细化。传统上，这些划分器采用启发式方法进行粗化，并且不考虑超图的结构特征。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种多级谱框架 SHyPar，通过利用超边有效阻力和基于流的社区检测技术来划分大规模超图。受最新理论谱聚类框架（例如 HyperEF 和 HyperSF）的启发，SHyPar 旨在将大型超图分解为多个分区间超边（切割尺寸）很少的子图。 SHyPar 的一个关键组件是用于超图粗化的基于流的局部聚类方案，该方案结合了基于最大流的算法来生成电导率显着提高的聚类。此外，SHyPar 利用有效的基于电阻的评级函数来合并强连接（耦合）的节点。与现有最先进的超图划分方法相比，我们对现实世界 VLSI 设计的大量实验结果表明，SHyPar 可以更有效地划分超图，实现最先进的解决方案质量。

items.title: Look-Up Table-Based Energy-Efficient Architecture for Neural Accelerators (LANA).
items.abstract: Digital Von-Neumann implementations of neural accelerators are limited by high power consumption and area overheads, while Analog and non-CMOS implementations suffer from noise, device mismatch, and reliability issues. This article introduces a CMOS look-up table (LUT)-based architecture for neural accelerators (LANA) that reduces the power consumption and area overhead of conventional digital implementations through precomputed, faster LUT access while avoiding noise and mismatch challenges of analog circuits. To solve the scalability issues of conventional LUT-based computation, we use a divide-and-conquer (D&C) approach to split high-precision multiply accumulate (MAC) operations into lower-precision MAC. LANA achieves up to 29.54 × lower area with 3.34 × lower energy per inference task compared to traditional LUT (T-LUT)-based techniques and up to 1.24 × lower area with 1.80 × lower energy per inference task than conventional digital MAC (Wallace tree/array multipliers) without retraining and without affecting the accuracy of pretrained unpruned models, as well as on lottery ticket pruning (LTP) models that already reduce the number of required MAC operations by up to 98%. Finally, we introduce mixed precision analysis in the LANA framework for all LTP pruned and unpruned models (VGG11, VGG19, Resnet18, Resnet34, GoogleNet) that achieved up to 29.59 × (GoogleNet pruned)- 62.83 × (VGG11 unpruned) lower area with 3.34 × (GoogleNet pruned)- 8.1 × (VGG11 unpruned) lower energy per inference than T-LUT-based techniques, and up to 1.24 × (GoogleNet pruned)- 2.63 × (VGG11 unpruned) lower area requirement with 1.81 × (GoogleNet pruned)- 4.37 × (VGG11 unpruned) lower energy per inference across models as compared to conventional digital MAC-based techniques with ~1% accuracy loss relative to the baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 神经加速器的数字冯诺依曼实现受到高功耗和面积开销的限制，而模拟和非 CMOS 实现则受到噪声、器件失配和可靠性问题的困扰。本文介绍了一种基于 CMOS 查找表 (LUT) 的神经加速器 (LANA) 架构，该架构通过预计算、更快的 LUT 访问来降低传统数字实现的功耗和面积开销，同时避免模拟电路的噪声和失配挑战。为了解决传统基于 LUT 的计算的可扩展性问题，我们使用分而治之 (D&C) 方法将高精度乘法累加 (MAC) 运算拆分为较低精度的 MAC。 LANA 使用 29.54 × 较低区域xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> $3.34 \times $ 与传统的基于 LUT (T-LUT) 的技术相比，每个推理任务的能量更低，最高可达 1.24 × 带有 1.80 × 每个推理任务的能量比传统数字 MAC（华莱士树/数组乘法器）更低，无需重新训练，且不影响准确性预训练的未剪枝模型，以及彩票剪枝 (LTP) 模型，这些模型已经将所需的 MAC 操作数量减少了高达 98%。最后，我们在 LANA 框架中为所有 LTP 剪枝和未剪枝模型（VGG11、VGG19、Resnet18、Resnet34、GoogleNet）引入混合精度分析，其达到 29.59 × (GoogleNet 修剪)- 62.83 × （VGG11 未修剪）下部区域 3.34 × （GoogleNet 修剪）- 8.1 × （VGG11 未修剪）每次推理的能量低于基于 T-LUT 的技术，最高可达 1.24 × （GoogleNet 修剪）- 2.63 × （VGG11 未修剪）通过 1.81 × 降低面积要求 (GoogleNet修剪）- 4.37 × （VGG11 未修剪）与模型相比，每次推理的能量更低传统的基于数字 MAC 的技术相对于基线的精度损失约为 1%。

items.title: Atelier: An Automated Analog Circuit Design Framework via Multiple Large Language Model-Based Agents.
items.abstract: This article introduces Atelier, a large language model (LLM)-based framework for analog circuit design to address the issues of data scarcity and the substantial domain-specific knowledge required in this field. Atelier integrates general-purpose LLMs with a high-quality, compact knowledge base to fulfill the considerable knowledge requirements of analog circuit design, obviating the need for extensive domain-specific training or fine-tuning. The knowledge base is meticulously curated to be task-oriented and encapsulates critical information from pertinent literature within user-defined templates, leveraging the LLMs’ capabilities in text comprehension and summarization. The framework comprises several LLM agents, structured in a graph-of-thoughts architecture, with each agent specialized in a distinct task in analog circuit design, including circuit analysis, topology selection, topology modification, parameter tuning, and design decision. This collaborative multiagent system, enriched with access to the compact knowledge base and advanced mechanisms, such as self-reflection, backtracking, and tool integration, automates the analog circuit design process. It significantly enhances design quality and efficiency while ensuring interpretability. Experimental results highlight Atelier’s superiority over state-of-the-art black-box methods, general-purpose LLMs, and LLM-based methods, demonstrating notable improvements in success rates, design quality, and runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Atelier，这是一个基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的模拟电路设计框架，旨在解决数据稀缺问题以及该领域所需的大量特定领域知识。 Atelier 将通用法学硕士与高质量、紧凑的知识库相结合，以满足模拟电路设计的大量知识要求，从而无需进行广泛的特定领域培训或微调。该知识库经过精心策划，以任务为导向，并将来自相关文献的关键信息封装在用户定义的模板中，利用法学硕士在文本理解和总结方面的能力。该框架由多个 LLM 代理组成，采用思维图架构构建，每个代理专门从事模拟电路设计中的不同任务，包括电路分析、拓扑选择、拓扑修改、参数调整和设计决策。这种协作式多智能体系统通过访问紧凑的知识库和先进的机制（例如自我反思、回溯和工具集成）而丰富，可实现模拟电路设计过程的自动化。它显着提高了设计质量和效率，同时确保了可解释性。实验结果凸显了 Atelier 相对于最先进的黑盒方法、通用法学硕士和基于法学硕士的方法的优越性，证明了其在成功率、设计质量和运行时间方面的显着改进。

items.title: Probabilistic Injection-Based Reliability Evaluation for Correlated Input Vectors in Sequential Circuits.
items.abstract: As complementary metal oxide semiconductor (CMOS) technology continues to scale, the associated reduction in device reliability margins has made accurate reliability evaluation a critical component of digital circuit design. Traditional methods typically assess reliability based on the average behavior of multiple input vectors (MIVs), while neglecting the significant variation introduced by individual input vector (IIV). In practice, different input vector often exhibit heterogeneous reliability distributions, and in sequential circuits with temporal correlation, these differences may span several orders of magnitude. This article proposes a probabilistic injection framework for reliability analysis that explicitly considers input correlation in a sequential circuit. The method enables both fine-grained evaluation for each individual IV (IIV) and global assessment across multiple IVs (MIVs), thereby offering a comprehensive understanding of not only average circuit reliability but also reliability bounds under specific input conditions. Experimental results on ISCAS’89, ITC’99, IWLS’05, and reference benchmark circuits demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves higher accuracy and greater stability compared to traditional methods.
items.abstract_zh: 随着互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 技术的不断扩展，器件可靠性裕度的相应降低使得准确的可靠性评估成为数字电路设计的关键组成部分。传统方法通常根据多个输入向量 (MIV) 的平均行为来评估可靠性，而忽略单个输入向量 (IIV) 引入的显着变化。在实践中，不同的输入向量通常表现出异构的可靠性分布，并且在具有时间相关性的时序电路中，这些差异可能跨越几个数量级。本文提出了一种用于可靠性分析的概率注入框架，该框架明确考虑了时序电路中的输入相关性。该方法既可以对每个单独的 IV (IIV) 进行细粒度评估，也可以对多个 IV (MIV) 进行全局评估，从而不仅可以全面了解平均电路可靠性，还可以全面了解特定输入条件下的可靠性界限。 ISCAS'89、ITC'99、IWLS'05 和参考基准电路上的实验结果表明，与传统方法相比，所提出的方法具有更高的精度和稳定性。

items.title: Identifying Design Challenges in Analog Circuits Due to Device Nonidealities at Cryogenic Temperatures.
items.abstract: This work presents a detailed analysis of the impact of MOS device performance on circuit metrics at cryogenic temperatures. An experimentally proven, industry standard compact model is calibrated to match the performance of the corresponding devices from ST Microelectronics 28nm (STM28) PDK. The temperature related parameters of this model are then calibrated with experimental data at cryogenic temperatures, available in the literature. This model is then used to explore a Strong-Arm latched comparator, a 4-bit Flash analog-to-digital converter (ADC) and a ring oscillator to study temperature-dependent performance trends. We point out certain key concerns which necessitate additional design effort and area/hardware overhead required to achieve the desired specifications at cryogenic temperatures.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作详细分析了低温下 MOS 器件性能对电路指标的影响。经过实验验证的行业标准紧凑型模型经过校准，可匹配 ST Micro electronics 28nm (STM28) PDK 相应器件的性能。然后使用文献中提供的低温下的实验数据来校准该模型的温度相关参数。然后，该模型用于探索 Strong-Arm 锁存比较器、4 位闪存模数转换器 (ADC) 和环形振荡器，以研究与温度相关的性能趋势。我们指出了某些关键问题，这些问题需要额外的设计工作和面积/硬件开销才能在低温下达到所需的规格。

items.title: Reactive Deadlock Avoidance Based on Focus Routing Graph Classification for Triplet-Based Architecture Network-on-Chip.
items.abstract: The implementation of network-on-chip (NoC) architectures presents considerable advantages in performance relative to traditional bus-based systems. However, the sophisticated nature of NoC designs demands careful oversight of shared resources to mitigate potential performance issues. In this context, well-structured routing algorithms are essential, as they facilitate improved traffic management and minimize congestion. Furthermore, mechanisms for deadlock prevention and avoidance are integral to routing algorithms, ensuring continuous packet transmission and ultimately enhancing network performance. This article introduces a novel reactive deadlock avoidance method for Triplet-Based Architecture Intercore NoC (TriBA-cNoC). that classifies routing based on focus routing graph (FRG) size to address routing-level deadlocks caused by the combination of deterministic routing and TriBA-cNoC’s inherent network characteristics. Compared to proactive techniques, it improves downstream buffer utilization and reduces power consumption. Furthermore, two shortest-path routing algorithms are introduced: DM4T-M, which incorporates a round-robin selection mechanism to alleviate congestion on critical paths and minimize hot-node formation. TriBA-cNoC streamlined routing (TSR), a novel two-stage distributed routing algorithm, addresses the computational overhead associated with output port selection in previous algorithms. Simulation results obtained using gem5 show that the proposed approach, which integrates routing-level reactive deadlock avoidance with the proposed routing algorithms, yields improvements in latency, throughput, buffer utilization, and power consumption. TSR and DM4T-M achieve latency reductions of up to 34.89% and 28.2%, respectively. Throughput increases of up to 16.94% and 7.81% are observed for TSR and DM4T-M, respectively. Moreover, the proposed approaches enhance buffer utilization by up to 13.9% and 10.44%, while reducing power consumption by up to 9.64%.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统的基于总线的系统相比，片上网络（NoC）架构的实现在性能方面具有相当大的优势。然而，NoC 设计的复杂性要求对共享资源进行仔细监督，以减轻潜在的性能问题。在这种情况下，结构良好的路由算法至关重要，因为它们有助于改进流量管理并最大限度地减少拥塞。此外，死锁预防和避免机制是路由算法不可或缺的一部分，可确保连续的数据包传输并最终增强网络性能。本文介绍了一种新颖的基于三元组架构核心间 NoC (TriBA-cNoC) 的反应式死锁避免方法。根据焦点路由图（FRG）大小对路由进行分类，以解决由确定性路由和 TriBA-cNoC 固有网络特性相结合引起的路由级死锁。与主动技术相比，它提高了下游缓冲区利用率并降低了功耗。此外，还引入了两种最短路径路由算法：DM4T-M，它采用循环选择机制来缓解关键路径上的拥塞并最大限度地减少热节点的形成。 TriBA-cNoC 流线型路由 (TSR) 是一种新颖的两级分布式路由算法，解决了先前算法中与输出端口选择相关的计算开销。使用 gem5 获得的仿真结果表明，所提出的方法将路由级反应性死锁避免与所提出的路由算法相结合，在延迟、吞吐量、缓冲区利用率和功耗方面产生了改进。 TSR 和 DM4T-M 的延迟分别降低了 34.89% 和 28.2%。 TSR 和 DM4T-M 的吞吐量分别增加了 16.94% 和 7.81%。此外，所提出的方法将缓冲区利用率提高了高达 13.9% 和 10.44%，同时降低了高达 9.64% 的功耗。

items.title: Maelstrom: A Logic Synthesis Technique for Asynchronous Circuits.
items.abstract: A new synthesis method and corresponding open-source tool, called Maelstrom, is introduced, that synthesizes CHP programs into asynchronous circuits. The method is agnostic to circuit family, and produces circuits that show significant improvements over the state-of-the-art synthesis techniques for asynchronous circuits in terms of energy, delay and area. The method also supports different datapath implementations and communication protocols. Prelayout SPICE simulations of generated netlists of several CHP programs in a 65nm node indicate significant performance benefits over the current state-of-the-art. Maelstrom has also been used to successfully synthesize and fabricate a chip from an abstract high-level functional description. This represents a qualitative improvement in logic synthesis of asynchronous logic from behavioral descriptions.
items.abstract_zh: 引入了一种新的综合方法和相应的开源工具，称为 Maelstrom，将 CHP 程序综合到异步电路中。该方法与电路系列无关，并且产生的电路在能量、延迟和面积方面比最先进的异步电路合成技术有显着改进。该方法还支持不同的数据路径实现和通信协议。对 65nm 节点中多个 CHP 程序生成的网表进行的预布局 SPICE 仿真表明，与当前最先进的技术相比，具有显着的性能优势。 Maelstrom 还被用来根据抽象的高级功能描述成功地合成和制造芯片。这代表了来自行为描述的异步逻辑的逻辑综合的质的改进。

items.title: A Post-Routing Layout Optimization Framework for Lithography Process Window Enlargement.
items.abstract: Lithography compliance is required to guarantee manufacturability of advanced integrated circuits. Conventional flow to enhance lithography printability relies on techniques like optical proximity correction and SRAF which happen at mask design. The optimization space at such a late design stage can be extremely limited due to fixed placement and routing solutions after layout design. In this work, we aim at optimizing lithography printability at early design stages and propose a post-routing layout optimization framework to enlarge lithography process window. The framework leverages a transformer-based deep learning model for fast process window evaluation and simultaneously modifies the layout patterns for lithography compliance, while subjecting to design rules and connectivity constraints. The experimental results exemplify the capability of exploiting our framework to improve the lithography window by an average of 4.31%. Furthermore, the framework greatly improves optimization for layouts with hotspots.
items.abstract_zh: 需要符合光刻合规性才能保证先进集成电路的可制造性。增强光刻适印性的传统流程依赖于掩模设计时发生的光学邻近校正和 SRAF 等技术。由于布局设计后的固定布局和布线解决方案，如此后期设计阶段的优化空间可能极其有限。在这项工作中，我们的目标是在早期设计阶段优化光刻印刷适性，并提出一种后布线布局优化框架来扩大光刻工艺窗口。该框架利用基于变压器的深度学习模型进行快速工艺窗口评估，并同时修改布局模式以实现光刻合规性，同时遵守设计规则和连接性约束。实验结果证明了利用我们的框架将光刻窗口平均提高 4.31% 的能力。此外，该框架极大地改进了热点布局的优化。

items.title: A Novel MDM-Based Optical Networks-on-Chip With Reliability Analysis.
items.abstract: Ever-increasing demands for lower power loss, shorter transmission delay, and higher communication capacity have been a challenge in optical networks-on-chips (ONoCs). To address this, various multiplexing technologies have been proposed and applied to optical interconnection networks. Among these, mode-division multiplexing (MDM) technology stands out for its ability to significantly enhance network throughput and reduce communication delays by simultaneously transmitting multiple-mode optical signals through a multimode waveguide, making it a compelling research area. In this article, we propose a flexible and scalable multimode optical switching element (MOSE) that adjusts transmitted optical signals by modifying its structure. A multimode optical router (MOR) based on the proposed MOSE is introduced, followed by the design of MDM-based optical mesh networks-on-chip (MMONoCs) that support parallel transmission of multiple TE-polarization mode optical signals. Additionally, loss and crosstalk models for multimode optical devices, including MOSE and MOR, are systematically established. In conclusion, the loss, optical signal-to-noise ratio (OSNR), and bit error rate (BER) for three TE-polarization modes (TE0, TE1, and TE2) at different network scales are analyzed using MOR as a specific example. The findings indicate that the scalability of MMONoC and its communication quality are mainly influenced by mode crosstalk noise. Furthermore, network performance metrics, including end-to-end (ETE) delay and throughput, are discussed based on two-mode (TE0, TE1) and three-mode (TE0, TE1, and TE2) optical signals at 1550 nm in 4× 4 and 5× 5 optical mesh networks. Simulation results demonstrate that MMONoC exhibits significant improvements in ETE delay and throughput compared to traditional single-mode optical modes.
items.abstract_zh: 对更低功耗、更短传输延迟和更高通信容量的需求不断增长，一直是片上光网络 (ONoC) 面临的挑战。为了解决这个问题，已经提出了各种复用技术并将其应用于光互连网络。其中，模分复用（MDM）技术因其能够通过多模波导同时传输多模光信号来显着提高网络吞吐量并减少通信延迟而脱颖而出，使其成为一个引人注目的研究领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种灵活且可扩展的多模光开关元件（MOSE），可通过修改其结构来调整传输的光信号。介绍了一种基于所提出的 MOSE 的多模光路由器 (MOR)，随后设计了支持多个 TE 偏振模式光信号并行传输的基于 MDM 的光网状片上网络 (MMONoC)。此外，系统地建立了多模光器件（包括MOSE和MOR）的损耗和串扰模型。总之，以MOR为例，分析了不同网络规模下三种TE偏振模式（TE0、TE1和TE2）的损耗、光信噪比（OSNR）和误码率（BER）。研究结果表明，MMONoC 的可扩展性及其通信质量主要受模式串扰噪声的影响。此外，在 4× 4 和 5× 5 光学网状网络。仿真结果表明，与传统单模光模式相比，MMONoC 在 ETE 延迟和吞吐量方面表现出显着改进。

items.title: An Analytical Model for Performance-Carbon Co-Optimization of Edge AI Accelerators.
items.abstract: Application-specified integrated circuit (ASIC) accelerators have emerged as vital solutions to deploy various AI workloads, especially in resource-constrained edge scenarios. Existing analytical models for guiding the architectural exploration of these accelerators focus solely on performance and energy efficiency metrics while overlooking the carbon cost. In contrast, existing carbon cost models focus on analyzing specific hardware configurations but lack the support for exploration of the optimal architecture choices and the tradeoff analysis between performance and carbon cost. To fill this gap, this brief aims to analyze the impact of different architecture configurations from both the performance and carbon perspectives, exploring the tradeoff between the performance and carbon cost for AI accelerator design. For this purpose, we first built an analytical model, named CarbonSpot, capable of modeling and estimating both performance and carbon cost for any accelerator architecture in the design space. Then, by benchmarking the overhead of these AI accelerators under MLPerf-Tiny and MLPerf-Mobile workloads, we show that architectures solely optimized for performance and energy efficiency produce 58× more carbon emissions than designs designed for the highest carbon efficiency. Importantly, co-optimized architectural choices exist, with only https://github.com/KULeuven-MICAS/carbonspot
items.abstract_zh: 应用专用集成电路 (ASIC) 加速器已成为部署各种人工智能工作负载的重要解决方案，特别是在资源受限的边缘场景中。用于指导这些加速器架构探索的现有分析模型仅关注性能和能源效率指标，而忽视了碳成本。相比之下，现有的碳成本模型侧重于分析特定的硬件配置，但缺乏对最优架构选择的探索以及性能和碳成本之间的权衡分析的支持。为了填补这一空白，本文旨在从性能和碳排放角度分析不同架构配置的影响，探索人工智能加速器设计的性能和碳成本之间的权衡。为此，我们首先构建了一个名为 CarbonSpot 的分析模型，能够对设计空间中任何加速器架构的性能和碳成本进行建模和估计。然后，通过在 MLPerf-Tiny 和 MLPerf-Mobile 工作负载下对这些 AI 加速器的开销进行基准测试，我们表明，仅针对性能和能源效率进行优化的架构会产生 58× 比为最高碳效率而设计的设计多产生碳排放量。重要的是，存在协同优化的架构选择，与针对最大性能或最小碳影响进行优化的相应最佳案例相比，性能下降仅 https://github.com/KULeuven-MICAS/carbonspot

items.title: Shiro: Efficient and Accurate In-Storage Data Lifetime Separation for nand Flash SSDs.
items.abstract: The log-structured nature of nand flash storage necessitates garbage collection (GC) in solid state drives (SSDs). GC is a major source of runtime write amplification (WA), leading to faster device wear out and interference with host I/Os. The key to mitigating this problem is separating data by lifetime so that data in the same flash block are invalidated within temporal proximity. For higher lifetime prediction accuracy and adaptibility, prior works proposed using machine learning (ML) algorithms for data separation. However, existing learning-based solutions perform data lifetime prediction at the host side, leading to several drawbacks. First, host-side prediction does not have knowledge of the internal data movement inside the SSD during GC, and thus fails to leverage the opportunity to further separate GC writes, resulting in suboptimal WA reduction in the long term. Second, performing prediction at the host significantly prolongs the I/O critical path and consumes host resources that could otherwise be used for serving user applications. We present Shiro, a holistic flash translation layer (FTL) design that performs in-storage data separation for both user writes and GC writes for maximal long-term WA reduction. For user writes, Shiro uses a sequence model to accurately predict data lifetime by learning lifetime distribution from long historical access patterns. For GC writes, Shiro incorporates a reinforcement learning-assisted page migration strategy that takes direct feedback from long-term WA to further improve data separation efficacy. To address the challenges posed by performing fine-grained and real-time ML decisions inside the resource-constrained SSD, we propose a suite of enabling techniques to keep computation and storage overhead low. Extensive evaluation of Shiro on real-world traces shows that Shiro can deliver 29%–68% lower WA compared with conventional FTL and state-of-the-art in-storage data separation schemes. Furthermore, thanks to lower data migration overhead during GC, Shiro achieves significantly higher steady-state I/O performance.
items.abstract_zh: nand 闪存存储的日志结构性质需要固态硬盘 (SSD) 中的垃圾收集 (GC)。 GC 是运行时写入放大 (WA) 的主要来源，会导致设备更快磨损并干扰主机 I/O。缓解此问题的关键是按生命周期分离数据，以便同一闪存块中的数据在时间邻近范围内失效。为了获得更高的寿命预测精度和适应性，先前的工作提出使用机器学习（ML）算法进行数据分离。然而，现有的基于学习的解决方案在主机端执行数据生命周期预测，导致了一些缺点。首先，主机端预测不了解 GC 期间 SSD 内部的数据移动，因此无法利用机会进一步分离 GC 写入，从而导致长期 WA 减少效果不理想。其次，在主机上执行预测会显着延长 I/O 关键路径，并消耗原本可用于服务用户应用程序的主机资源。我们推出 Shiro，这是一种整体闪存转换层 (FTL) 设计，可为用户写入和 GC 写入执行存储内数据分离，以最大程度地减少长期 WA。对于用户写入，Shiro 使用序列模型通过从长期历史访问模式中学习生命周期分布来准确预测数据生命周期。对于GC写入，Shiro采用了强化学习辅助的页面迁移策略，该策略接受长期WA的直接反馈，以进一步提高数据分离效率。为了解决在资源受限的 SSD 中执行细粒度和实时 ML 决策所带来的挑战，我们提出了一套支持技术来保持较低的计算和存储开销。对 Shiro 对现实世界痕迹的广泛评估表明，与传统的 FTL 和最先进的存储内数据分离方案相比，Shiro 可以将 WA 降低 29%–68%。此外，由于 GC 期间数据迁移开销较低，Shiro 实现了显着更高的稳态 I/O 性能。

items.title: iMAC: Toward Accelerating Deep Neural Networks by Predicting and Removing Ineffectual MAC Operations.
items.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are employed in a broad range of classification tasks. Despite CNNs have reached high accuracy, they have high computational complexity, so employing this method in many applications, such as Internet of Things (IoT) is challenging. To overcome this challenge, CNN hardware accelerators are proposed. As the main activation function employed in the CNNs is ReLU, a large portion of the output becomes zero. Therefore, sparse CNN accelerators are proposed to reduce the computational complexity. Recent studies show that, rather than employing sparse CNN accelerators, it would be ideal to predict the zero outputs and remove the corresponding computations. In this article, we propose the iMAC accelerator to bypass ineffectual computations (a computation leads to zero). For this purpose, we propose a prediction unit that determines ineffectual computations without accuracy loss. Then we propose a dataflow to bypass ineffectual computations. The results show that by increasing 12% of area and 18% power overhead, iMAC achieves 2.31× speedup and 1.95× energy efficiency without any accuracy loss. With 3% accuracy loss, it further improves the speed and the energy by 2.94× and 2.49× , respectively. Moreover, compared to the previous prediction method, our method achieves higher speedup and improvement.
items.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）广泛应用于分类任务中。尽管 CNN 已经达到了高精度，但它们的计算复杂度很高，因此在物联网 (IoT) 等许多应用中采用这种方法具有挑战性。为了克服这一挑战，提出了 CNN 硬件加速器。由于 CNN 中使用的主要激活函数是 ReLU，因此大部分输出变为零。因此，稀疏CNN加速器被提出来降低计算复杂度。最近的研究表明，与其使用稀疏 CNN 加速器，不如预测零输出并删除相应的计算。在本文中，我们提出 iMAC 加速器来绕过无效计算（计算结果为零）。为此，我们提出了一种预测单元，可以在不损失准确性的情况下确定无效计算。然后我们提出一个数据流来绕过无效的计算。结果表明，通过增加 12% 的面积和 18% 的功耗，iMAC 实现了 2.31× 加速和 1.95× 能源效率，且没有任何精度损失。精度损失 3%，进一步提高了 2.94× 和 2.49× 分别。此外，与之前的预测方法相比，我们的方法实现了更高的加速和改进。

items.title: Dynamic Interposer Obfuscation Through Distributed Scramblers in Heterogeneously Integrated 2.5D ICs.
items.abstract: Recent breakthroughs in heterogeneous integration (HI) using 2.5D and 3-D integrated circuits (ICs) have been key to advances in the semiconductor industry. However, HI has also led to several sources of distrust due to the use of third-party intellectual property (IP), testing, and fabrication facilities in the design and manufacturing process. Recent work on 2.5D IC security has focused on attacks that can be mounted through rogue chiplets integrated in the design. Thus, existing solutions implement interchiplet communication protocols that prevent unauthorized data modification and interruption in a 2.5D system. However, none of the existing solutions offer inherent security against IP theft. We develop a comprehensive threat model for 2.5D systems indicating that such systems remain vulnerable to IP theft. We present a method that prevents IP theft by obfuscating the connectivity of chiplets on the interposer using reconfigurable interconnection networks. We further achieve dynamic obfuscation of chiplet interconnects while demonstrating resilience against removal, data-snooping, test-based data leakage attacks. We present an approach to implement reconfigurable chiplet interconnection networks through both centralized and distributed scrambler designs, evaluating the security and implementation benefits of both the architectures. We present a comprehensive methodology to design, implement, and integrate interconnect scramblers in a large 2.5D HI system. We also evaluate the power, performance, and area overhead for both distributed and centralized scramblers.
items.abstract_zh: 最近在使用 2.5D 和 3D 集成电路 (IC) 的异构集成 (HI) 方面取得的突破是半导体行业进步的关键。然而，由于在设计和制造过程中使用第三方知识产权 (IP)、测试和制造设施，HI 也导致了多种不信任。最近有关 2.5D IC 安全的工作重点关注可通过设计中集成的恶意小芯片发起的攻击。因此，现有解决方案实施小芯片间通信协议，以防止 2.5D 系统中未经授权的数据修改和中断。然而，现有的解决方案都没有提供针对 IP 盗窃的固有安全性。我们为 2.5D 系统开发了一个全面的威胁模型，表明此类系统仍然容易受到 IP 盗窃的影响。我们提出了一种方法，通过使用可重新配置的互连网络来混淆中介层上小芯片的连接性，从而防止 IP 盗窃。我们进一步实现了小芯片互连的动态混淆，同时展示了针对删除、数据窥探、基于测试的数据泄漏攻击的弹性。我们提出了一种通过集中式和分布式扰码器设计来实现可重新配置的小芯片互连网络的方法，并评估这两种架构的安全性和实现优势。我们提出了一种在大型 2.5D HI 系统中设计、实现和集成互连扰码器的综合方法。我们还评估了分布式和集中式扰码器的功率、性能和面积开销。

items.title: WOM-FTL: An Efficient FTL for High-Density Flash Memory Through WOM-v Codes.
items.abstract: High-density nand flash memory, such as quadruple-level cell (QLC) flash, has been widely adopted in emerging storage systems. However, its limited endurance and performance challenges necessitate novel solutions. Voltage-based write-once memory (WOM-v) codes have demonstrated their effectiveness in extending flash memory lifespan by reducing the erase count of flash blocks. Concurrently, secure deletion is essential to ensure data privacy in flash-based storage systems. Existing secure deletion approaches—encryption-based, erasure-based, and scrubbing-based—often face limitations, such as susceptibility to deciphering or significant performance overheads. Additionally, the inherent “big block problem” in high-density flash memory complicates garbage collection (GC), further degrading system performance. To address these challenges, this article proposes WOM-FTL, a flash translation layer (FTL) that integrates secure deletion and GC with WOM-v codes to enhance both security and performance. WOM-FTL classifies request data into four categories based on access frequency and privacy requirements: 1) hot-secure (HS); 2) cold-secure (CS); 3) hot-unsecure (HU); and 4) cold-unsecure (CU). Additionally, WOM-FTL divides each block into several equal-sized sub-blocks and further classifies them into top sub-blocks and bottom sub-blocks according to their data storage characteristics. When a secure data deletion command is issued to the storage device, WOM-FTL leverages unsecure data (HU and CU) to overwrite the secure data (HS and CS). Furthermore, WOM-FTL allocates different types of request data to the corresponding sub-blocks, creating a data allocation pattern that is both scrubbing-friendly and GC-friendly. Experimental results demonstrate that WOM-FTL improves the I/O performance of storage systems by 60.91% compared to state-of-the-art solutions, providing a significant advancement in secure and efficient management of high-density flash memory.
items.abstract_zh: 高密度nand闪存，例如四级单元（QLC）闪存，已在新兴存储系统中得到广泛采用。然而，其有限的耐用性和性能挑战需要新颖的解决方案。基于电压的一次写入存储器（WOM-v）代码已经证明了其通过减少闪存块的擦除次数来延长闪存寿命的有效性。同时，安全删除对于确保基于闪存的存储系统中的数据隐私至关重要。现有的安全删除方法（基于加密、基于擦除和基于清理）通常面临限制，例如容易被破译或显着的性能开销。此外，高密度闪存固有的“大块问题”使垃圾收集（GC）变得复杂，进一步降低了系统性能。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了 WOM-FTL，这是一种闪存转换层 (FTL)，它将安全删除和 GC 与 WOM-v 代码集成在一起，以增强安全性和性能。 WOM-FTL根据访问频率和隐私要求将请求数据分为四类：1）热安全（HS）； 2）冷安全（CS）； 3）热不安全（HU）； 4）冷不安全（CU）。此外，WOM-FTL将每个块划分为多个大小相等的子块，并根据其数据存储特性将它们进一步分为顶部子块和底部子块。当向存储设备发出安全数据删除命令时，WOM-FTL 利用不安全数据（HU 和 CU）覆盖安全数据（HS 和 CS）。此外，WOM-FTL将不同类型的请求数据分配到相应的子块，创建了一种既对清理友好又对GC友好的数据分配模式。实验结果表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，WOM-FTL将存储系统的I/O性能提高了60.91%，在高密度闪存的安全、高效管理方面取得了显着进步。

items.title: Fast Yield Analysis and Optimization Based on Sensitivity and Orthogonal Sampling.
items.abstract: Process variations in advanced integrated circuit pose significant challenges for robust system design. This brief presents a novel fast Monte Carlo (FMC) low-sigma yield analysis method for various digital, analog, and mixed-signal circuits. The FMC approach employs a quadratic surrogate model based on sensitivity analysis to minimize simulation overhead, while incorporating a finite difference with orthogonal sampling (FDOS) technique that significantly reduces time complexity compared to the conventional finite difference method (FDM), especially in high-dimensional parameter spaces. Additionally, sensitivity differential evolution FMC (SDEFMC) method is proposed, which employs a hybrid yield optimization framework, along with a comprehensive sorting strategy and a relative constraint violation (RCV)-based selection technique to expedite the search for optimal design. Experiments on real-world circuits with tens to hundreds of parameters show that FMC achieves 75 × to 207 × speedup over Monte Carlo (MC) while maintaining high accuracy, and SDEFMC delivers 4.0 × to 25.5 × speedup with notable yield improvements compared to existing approaches, demonstrating the potential for large-scale circuit applications.
items.abstract_zh: 先进集成电路的工艺变化对稳健的系统设计提出了重大挑战。本简介介绍了一种适用于各种数字、模拟和混合信号电路的新型快速蒙特卡罗 (FMC) 低西格玛良率分析方法。 FMC 方法采用基于灵敏度分析的二次代理模型来最大限度地减少仿真开销，同时结合正交采样有限差分 (FDOS) 技术，与传统有限差分方法 (FDM) 相比，该技术显着降低了时间复杂度，尤其是在高维参数空间中。此外，还提出了灵敏度差分进化 FMC (SDEFMC) 方法，该方法采用混合良率优化框架，以及综合排序策略和基于相对约束违规 (RCV) 的选择技术，以加快最佳设计的搜索。对具有数十到数百个参数的实际电路进行的实验表明，FMC 可将 75 × 实现为 207 × 比 Monte Carlo (MC) 加速，同时保持高精度，并且 SDEFMC 提供 4.0 × 到 25.5 × 与现有方法相比，速度提高，产量显着提高，展示了大规模电路应用的潜力。

items.title: Modeling and Analysis of Defects and Variations in Multibit FeFET Devices and Crossbar Architectures.
items.abstract: Ferroelectric field-effect transistors (FeFETs) have many promising applications, but the impact of manufacturing imperfections on these devices has yet to be studied comprehensively. We extend a previous FeFET compact model to combine the Preisach ferroelectric capacitor model with the BSIM-SOI MOSFET model. We calibrate this new compact model with data from a technology CAD model that is calibrated against a fabricated metal-ferroelectric-metal capacitor. We analyze polarization defects in the ferroelectric layer using this compact model. We address two classes of defects and map them to stuck-at-fault models, referred to as neutral faults, and stuck-at-plus and stuck-at-minus faults. We also present an analysis of the impact of device-level opens, shorts, coupling faults and extrinsic variations on the multilevel FeFET device in a 1T-1FeFET cell. Simulation results under a clustered fault distribution with a 2% fault rate for back-end-of-line (BEOL) faults show a maximum accuracy degradation of 83.86% and 81.66% for ResNet18 and VGG16, respectively, when inferencing is performed on faulty FeFET crossbar designs. Similarly, extrinsic variations and clustered polarization defects show a maximum accuracy degradation of 80% and 75% across both deep neural network (DNN) models, respectively. We also evaluate the effectiveness of write-verify for mitigating the impact of extrinsic variations, polarization defects, and BEOL faults.
items.abstract_zh: 铁电场效应晶体管 (FeFET) 有许多有前景的应用，但制造缺陷对这些器件的影响尚未得到全面研究。我们扩展了之前的 FeFET 紧凑模型，将 Preisach 铁电电容器模型与 BSIM-SOI MOSFET 模型相结合。我们使用来自技术 CAD 模型的数据来校准这个新的紧凑模型，该模型是针对制造的金属-铁电-金属电容器进行校准的。我们使用这个紧凑模型分析铁电层中的极化缺陷。我们解决了两类缺陷，并将它们映射到固定故障模型（称为中性故障）以及固定正故障和固定负故障。我们还分析了器件级开路、短路、耦合故障和外部变化对 1T-1FeFET 单元中多层 FeFET 器件的影响。后端 (BEOL) 故障故障率为 2% 的集群故障分布下的仿真结果表明，当对有故障的 FeFET 交叉开关设计进行推理时，ResNet18 和 VGG16 的最大精度分别下降 83.86% 和 81.66%。同样，在两个深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型中，外在变化和集群偏振缺陷的最大准确度分别下降了 80% 和 75%。我们还评估了写入验证在减轻外部变化、极化缺陷和 BEOL 故障影响方面的有效性。

items.title: Ultra Memory-Efficient On-FPGA Training of Transformers via Tensor-Compressed Optimization.
items.abstract: Transformer models have achieved state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of machine learning tasks. There is growing interest in training transformers on resource-constrained edge devices due to considerations, such as privacy, domain adaptation, and on-device scientific machine learning. However, the significant computational and memory demands required for transformer training often exceed the capabilities of an edge device. Leveraging low-rank tensor compression, this paper presents the first on-FPGA accelerator for transformer training. On the algorithm side, we present a bi-directional contraction flow for tensorized transformer training, significantly reducing the computational FLOPS and intralayer memory costs compared to existing tensor operations. On the hardware side, we store all highly compressed model parameters and gradient information on chip, creating an on-chip-memory-only framework for each stage in training. This reduces off-chip communication and minimizes latency and energy costs. Additionally, we implement custom computing kernels for each training stage and employ intralayer parallelism and pipe-lining to further enhance run-time and memory efficiency. Through experiments on transformer models within 36.7 to 93.5 MB using forward propagation (FP)-32 data formats on the ATIS dataset, our tensorized FPGA accelerator could conduct single-batch end-to-end training on the AMD Alevo U50 FPGA, with a memory budget of less than 6-MB BRAM and 22.5-MB URAM. Compared to uncompressed training on the NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU, our on-FPGA training achieves a memory reduction of 30 × to 51 × . Our FPGA accelerator also achieves up to 4.0 × less energy cost per epoch compared with tensor transformer training on an NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU. As an initial result, this article highlights the significant potential of large-scale tensor training on edge devices.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型在各种机器学习任务中都取得了最先进的性能。出于隐私、领域适应和设备上科学机器学习等考虑，人们对在资源有限的边缘设备上训练 Transformer 越来越感兴趣。然而，变压器训练所需的大量计算和内存需求通常超出了边缘设备的能力。本文利用低秩张量压缩，提出了第一个用于变压器训练的 FPGA 加速器。在算法方面，我们提出了用于张量化 Transformer 训练的双向收缩流程，与现有张量操作相比，显着降低了计算 FLOPS 和层内内存成本。在硬件方面，我们将所有高度压缩的模型参数和梯度信息存储在芯片上，为训练的每个阶段创建一个仅片上存储器的框架。这减少了片外通信并最大限度地减少了延迟和能源成本。此外，我们为每个训练阶段实现自定义计算内核，并采用层内并行性和管道来进一步提高运行时和内存效率。通过在 ATIS 数据集上使用前向传播 (FP)-32 数据格式对 36.7 至 93.5 MB 范围内的变压器模型进行实验，我们的张量化 FPGA 加速器可以在 AMD Alevo U50 FPGA 上进行单批次端到端训练，内存预算小于 6 MB BRAM 和 22.5 MB URAM。与 NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU 上的未压缩训练相比，我们的 FPGA 训练实现了内存减少 30 × 到 51 × 。与在张量变换器上进行训练相比，我们的 FPGA 加速器每个周期的能源成本可降低高达 4.0 × NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU。作为初步结果，本文强调了边缘设备上大规模张量训练的巨大潜力。

items.title: End-to-End Design Flow for Resistive Neural Accelerators.
items.abstract: Neural hardware accelerators have demonstrated notable energy efficiency in tackling tasks, which can be adapted to artificial neural network (ANN) structures. Research is currently directed toward leveraging resistive random-access memories (RRAMs) among various memristive devices. In conjunction with complementary metal-oxide semiconductor (CMOS) technologies within integrated circuits (ICs), RRAM devices are used to build such neural accelerators. In this study, we present a neural accelerator hardware design and verification flow, which uses a lookup table (LUT)-based Verilog-A model of IHP’s one-transistor-one-RRAM (1T1R) cell. In particular, we address the challenges of interfacing between abstract ANN simulations and circuit analysis by including a tailored Python wrapper into the design process for resistive neural hardware accelerators. To demonstrate our concept, the efficacy of the proposed design flow, we evaluate an ANN for the MNIST handwritten digit recognition task, as well as for the CIFAR-10 image recognition task, with the last layer verified through circuit simulation. Additionally, we implement different versions of a 1T1R model, based on quasi-static measurement data, providing insights on the effect of conductance level spacing and device-to-device variability. The circuit simulations tackle both schematic and physical layout assessment. The resulting recognition accuracies exhibit significant differences between the purely application-level PyTorch simulation and our proposed design flow, highlighting the relevance of circuit-level validation for the design of neural hardware accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 神经硬件加速器在处理任务方面表现出显着的能源效率，可以适应人工神经网络（ANN）结构。目前的研究方向是利用各种忆阻器件中的电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM)。 RRAM 器件与集成电路 (IC) 内的互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 技术相结合，用于构建此类神经加速器。在本研究中，我们提出了一种神经加速器硬件设计和验证流程，该流程使用 IHP 单晶体管一 RRAM (1T1R) 单元的基于查找表 (LUT) 的 Verilog-A 模型。特别是，我们通过将定制的 Python 包装器包含到电阻神经硬件加速器的设计过程中来解决抽象 ANN 模拟和电路分析之间的接口挑战。为了证明我们的概念以及所提出的设计流程的有效性，我们评估了 MNIST 手写数字识别任务以及 CIFAR-10 图像识别任务的 ANN，最后一层通过电路仿真进行了验证。此外，我们基于准静态测量数据实现了不同版本的 1T1R 模型，提供了有关电导水平间距和器件间变异性影响的见解。电路仿真解决原理图和物理布局评估。由此产生的识别精度在纯应用级 PyTorch 模拟和我们提出的设计流程之间表现出显着差异，突出了电​​路级验证与神经硬件加速器设计的相关性。

items.title: Flexible Automatic Design of GaN PA Based on Gaussian Process-Assisted Nondominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm.
items.abstract: This article introduces a new method for designing power amplifiers (PAs) using a flexible, automatic approach. It employs a Gaussian process (GP)-assisted fast nondominated sorting genetic algorithm (GP-NSGA-II) for both circuit synthesis and layout optimization. Traditional genetic algorithms are computationally intensive and have poor convergence, making them difficult to use with 3-D full-wave simulators. To address these issues, the authors incorporate GP regression from Bayesian optimization into NSGA-II, improving convergence and computational efficiency. The method integrates layout simulation and optimization, enabling automatic PA design with direct layout optimization. To demonstrate the method’s effectiveness, the authors design a wide-band PA and a tri-band PA using a 10-W gallium-nitride (GaN) high electron mobility transistor (HEMT). The tests show that the prototypes perform well: the wide-band PA has a power-added efficiency (PAE) of over 61% and an output power greater than 41.5 dBm in the 2-3 GHz band, while the tri-band PA achieves PAE values of over 59%, 55%, and 57% in the 0.7-1.1 GHz, 2.3-2.5 GHz, and 3.4-3.5 GHz bands, respectively, with output powers exceeding 41.2 dBm, 40.6 dBm, and 40.6 dBm.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种使用灵活的自动方法设计功率放大器 (PA) 的新方法。它采用高斯过程 (GP) 辅助的快速非支配排序遗传算法 (GP-NSGA-II) 进行电路综合和布局优化。传统的遗传算法计算量大且收敛性差，因此很难与 3D 全波模拟器一起使用。为了解决这些问题，作者将贝叶斯优化的 GP 回归合并到 NSGA-II 中，提高了收敛性和计算效率。该方法集成了布局仿真和优化，可实现自动 PA 设计和直接布局优化。为了证明该方法的有效性，作者使用 10W 氮化镓 (GaN) 高电子迁移率晶体管 (HEMT) 设计了宽带 PA 和三频 PA。测试结果表明，样机性能良好：宽带PA在2-3GHz频段功率附加效率（PAE）超过61%，输出功率大于41.5dBm，三频PA在0.7-1.1GHz、2.3-2.5GHz和3.4-3.5GHz频段PAE值分别超过59%、55%和57%，输出功率超过 41.2 dBm、40.6 dBm 和 40.6 dBm。

items.title: ASAP: Accelerating Corner-Based Timing Analysis With Bayesian Active Self-Attention Neural Process.
items.abstract: With the advancement of modern nanoscale technology nodes, static timing analysis (STA) has become an indispensable technique for ensuring circuit reliability and performance across diverse process conditions. However, traditional STA methods scale poorly to the explosion of process corners in the nanoscale fabrication technology. Despite some seminal works in using AI to accelerate such processes, they either lack reliability or stability. To this end, we introduce active self-attention neural process (ASAP), a novel approach addressing this challenge by combining both the latest deep learning methods and the classical Bayesian models to deliver scalable and accurate predictions with a self-calibration strategy to ensure reliability. Technically, the ASAP novelly integrates self-attention to help identify and prioritize crucial features under various input conditions and employs neural process to make confidence-based predictions for the final timing results. Furthermore, ASAP is equipped with Active Learning for self-refinement and self-correction. Experimental evaluations on benchmark circuits demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art work in STA accuracy by 18% in terms of prediction accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代纳米级技术节点的进步，静态时序分析（STA）已成为确保不同工艺条件下电路可靠性和性能不可或缺的技术。然而，传统的 STA 方法很难适应纳米级制造技术中工艺角点的爆炸性增长。尽管在使用人工智能加速这一过程方面有一些开创性的工作，但它们要么缺乏可靠性，要么缺乏稳定性。为此，我们引入主动自注意力神经过程（ASAP），这是一种解决这一挑战的新颖方法，它结合了最新的深度学习方法和经典贝叶斯模型，通过自校准策略提供可扩展且准确的预测，以确保可靠性。从技术上讲，ASAP 新颖地集成了自我注意力，以帮助识别和优先考虑各种输入条件下的关键特征，并采用神经过程对最终时序结果进行基于置信度的预测。此外，ASAP 还具备主动学习功能，可以进行自我完善和自我纠正。对基准电路的实验评估表明，就预测精度而言，我们的方法在 STA 精度方面比最先进的工作高出 18%。

items.title: FR2eRAM: A Fault-Resilient Graph Processing Paradigm in Realistic ReRAMs.
items.abstract: With the explosive growth of modern graph data, resistive random access memory (ReRAM)-based graph processing paradigms are emerging as promising solutions to the “memory wall” bottleneck. However, existing paradigms often lean on overly idealized ReRAM architectures, overlooking the critical influence of various hardware faults due to the analog nature and immature fabrication processes of realistic ReRAMs. These hardware faults can lead to convergence anomalies or unacceptable output deviations [i.e., severe errors (SEs)], undermining the reliability of ReRAM-based graph processing. While some studies enhance the reliability of ReRAM-based computation through fault-aware remapping or robust algorithm design, the unique graph execution characteristics make these efforts challenging to migrate effectively. In this work, we first develop ReGFI, a microarchitecture-level Fault Injection framework for ReRAM-based Graph processing. Unlike traditional fault injection (FI) methods that only introduce random algorithm-level faults, ReGFI precisely maps hardware faults into the microarchitectural graph execution flow to effectively characterize their effects on the execution correctness. Based on ReGFI, we propose FR2eRAM, a Fault-Resilient graph processing paradigm in realistic ReRAMs. First, observing the fault robustness of graph vertices compared to graph edges, we reverse-map the vertex values to the nonideal crossbar while using the edge values as inputs, for proactive SE avoidance. Then, leveraging the cell idleness in ReRAM crossbars and bit-wise reliability discrepancies of graph data, we recycle idle crossbar cells and squeeze out approximable least significant bits to robust-encode the fault-sensitive bits, for further SE elimination. Experimental results exhibit that FR2eRAM achieves 88.84% SE reduction while incurring negligible overhead for fault-resilient ReRAM-based graph processing. Furthermore, we evaluate the effectiveness and performance of FR2eRAM under different hardware configurations, graph datasets, and data formats.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代图形数据的爆炸性增长，基于电阻式随机存取存储器（ReRAM）的图形处理范例正在成为解决“内存墙”瓶颈的有希望的解决方案。然而，现有范例往往依赖于过于理想化的 ReRAM 架构，忽视了由于现实 ReRAM 的模拟特性和不成熟的制造工艺而导致的各种硬件故障的关键影响。这些硬件故障可能导致收敛异常或不可接受的输出偏差[即严重错误（SE）]，从而破坏基于ReRAM的图处理的可靠性。虽然一些研究通过故障感知重新映射或鲁棒算法设计来增强基于 ReRAM 的计算的可靠性，但独特的图执行特性使得这些工作难以有效迁移。在这项工作中，我们首先开发了 ReGFI，一种用于基于 ReRAM 的图处理的微架构级故障注入框架。与仅引入随机算法级故障的传统故障注入（FI）方法不同，ReGFI将硬件故障精确地映射到微架构图执行流中，以有效表征其对执行正确性的影响。基于 ReGFI，我们提出了 FR2eRAM，这是一种现实 ReRAM 中的容错图处理范例。首先，观察图顶点与图边相比的故障鲁棒性，我们将顶点值反向映射到非理想交叉开关，同时使用边值作为输入，以主动避免 SE。然后，利用 ReRAM 交叉开关中的单元空闲和图数据的逐位可靠性差异，我们回收空闲的交叉开关单元并挤出近似最低有效位以对故障敏感位进行鲁棒编码，以进一步消除 SE。实验结果表明，FR2eRAM 实现了 88.84% 的 SE 降低，同时基于 ReRAM 的故障恢复图形处理的开销可以忽略不计。此外，我们评估了 FR2eRAM 在不同硬件配置、图形数据集和数据格式下的有效性和性能。

items.title: An Elastic Federated Learning Collaboration Framework for Computing-Constrained IoT.
items.abstract: Through exploiting decentralized data from multisource Internet of Things (IoT) devices, federated learning (FL) can accomplish the training of deep neural network (DNN) models in a privacy-preserving manner to provide premium intelligent services. Due to portability considerations, most IoT devices are computing-constrained which cannot afford frequent DNN model training in FL. Existing approaches use model compression techniques to reduce computing cost of IoT devices, whereas accuracy degradation is inevitably incurred. To address this challenge, we propose an elastic FL collaboration framework (EFLCF), namely, EFLCF, to accommodate limited computing resources of IoT devices. Specifically, we first design an FL-oriented elastic neural network model with multiple-width subnets, and couple it with an FL device-server collaboration framework to form EFLCF, thereby releasing computing cost pressure of IoT devices. We then develop a freezing-assisted wide-to-narrow training mechanism to realize efficient device-server distributed training and further reduce device computing cost. Finally, we design an entropy-based narrow-to-wide elastic inference mechanism to decrease computing cost of inference without compromising accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that compared to well-known benchmarks, our EFLCF can reduce up to 97.65% device computing cost and improve up to 48.3% accuracy in training, while reducing up to 42.5% computing cost in inference.
items.abstract_zh: 通过利用来自多源物联网（IoT）设备的去中心化数据，联邦学习（FL）可以以保护隐私的方式完成深度神经网络（DNN）模型的训练，以提供优质的智能服务。出于可移植性的考虑，大多数 IoT 设备都受到计算限制，无法承受 FL 中频繁的 DNN 模型训练。现有方法使用模型压缩技术来降低物联网设备的计算成本，但不可避免地会导致精度下降。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种弹性 FL 协作框架（EFLCF），即 EFLCF，以适应物联网设备有限的计算资源。具体来说，我们首先设计了一个面向FL的具有多宽度子网的弹性神经网络模型，并将其与FL设备服务器协作框架耦合形成EFLCF，从而释放物联网设备的计算成本压力。然后，我们开发了一种冻结辅助的宽窄训练机制，以实现高效的设备-服务器分布式训练，并进一步降低设备计算成本。最后，我们设计了一种基于熵的窄到宽弹性推理机制，以在不影响准确性的情况下降低推理的计算成本。实验表明，与知名基准相比，我们的 EFLCF 可以降低高达 97.65% 的设备计算成本，提高高达 48.3% 的训练准确率，同时降低高达 42.5% 的推理计算成本。

items.title: A Proposal of Fast Thermal Simulation Method for 2.5-D Advanced Packaging to Enable Efficient Thermal-Aware Placement Optimization.
items.abstract: In this work, an efficient thermal-aware placement optimization framework is developed by combining a fast thermal simulation method (FTSM) with intelligent optimization algorithm. The FTSM for 2.5-D advanced packaging (AP) is proposed by improving global stiffness matrix and load vector reconstruction process of traditional finite element method (FEM). Its performance is verified by comparing it with the traditional FEM, the fast steady-state solver of the open-source HotSpot, and commercial software in terms of computational accuracy and efficiency. Then, an improved genetic algorithm (GA), the elite immigrant primal–dual GA (EI-PDGA) is developed for effective placement optimization. By combining the FTSM with the EI-PDGA, the efficient thermal-aware placement framework for 2.5-D AP is established. The performance of the proposed optimization framework is then evaluated through several cases studies, including comparisons with optimization frameworks with other intelligent algorithms in terms of effective layout area, maximum temperature, temperature uniformity, and total wirelength. Additionally, its time efficiency is compared with frameworks based on other thermal simulation methods.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，通过将快速热模拟方法（FTSM）与智能优化算法相结合，开发了一种高效的热感知布局优化框架。通过改进传统有限元方法（FEM）的全局刚度矩阵和载荷向量重建过程，提出了用于2.5维先进封装（AP）的FTSM。通过与传统有限元法、开源HotSpot的快速稳态求解器以及商业软件在计算精度和效率方面的比较，验证了其性能。然后，开发了一种改进的遗传算法（GA），即精英移民原始-对偶遗传算法（EI-PDGA），以实现有效的安置优化。通过将 FTSM 与 EI-PDGA 相结合，建立了 2.5-D AP 的高效热感知布局框架。然后通过几个案例研究评估所提出的优化框架的性能，包括在有效布局面积、最高温度、温度均匀性和总线长方面与其他智能算法的优化框架进行比较。此外，它的时间效率与基于其他热模拟方法的框架进行了比较。

items.title: DC-GCL: Dynamically Configurable Gate Control List in Automotive TSN Switch for ADAS.
items.abstract: time-sensitive networking (TSN) is widely used in advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) owing to its high reliability, low latency, and deterministic transmission. ADAS utilizes automotive TSN switches to connect various sensors and actuators, facilitating deterministic communication for different data flows. The time-aware shaper (TAS) in automotive TSN switch uses a preconfigured gate control list (GCL) for deterministic transmission of TSN flows. The GCL specifies the states of all gates (queues) and periodic transmission times, including time-triggered (TT), audio video bridging (AVB), and best-effort (BE) queues. The widely used methods involve generating a GCL configuration file offline before scheduling, known as statically configured GCL. However, there are nonperiodic but safety-critical event-triggered (ET) flows in ADAS, such as traffic incidents or alarms. ET flows are triggered by emergency events and require a timely response. In other words, ET flows should be transmitted immediately after TT flows. The statically configured GCL cannot provide timely scheduling for ET flows, as the time required for its reconfiguration is significantly longer than the time needed to configure ET flows. In this study, we propose a dynamically configurable GCL (DC-GCL) to adapt to the transmission of ET flows in automotive TSN switch for ADAS. We design a dynamic ET flow transmission solution in DC-GCL without affecting TT flows transmission. DC-GCL defines the ET flow as the second highest priority, allowing it to preempt the transmission of AVB and BE queues. We design a dynamic GCL scheduling window to calculate the queue and transmission time of ET flows. We further present a dynamic GCL configuration algorithm to initialize the GCL and enable dynamic GCL modification. We build a TSN-based ADAS prototype platform consisting of automotive-grade development boards and deploy DC-GCL in this platform. Experimental results show that DC-GCL significantly improves the scalability of GCL in different ADAS scenarios. Compared with statically configured GCL, DC-GCL reduces the end-to-end delay of TT flows by 40.9%–53.6% and ET flows by 81.1%–82.3%.
items.abstract_zh: 时间敏感网络（TSN）因其高可靠性、低延迟和确定性传输而广泛应用于高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）。 ADAS 利用汽车 TSN 开关连接各种传感器和执行器，促进不同数据流的确定性通信。汽车 TSN 交换机中的时间感知整形器 (TAS) 使用预配置的门控列表 (GCL) 来实现 TSN 流的确定性传输。 GCL指定所有门（队列）的状态和周期性传输时间，包括时间触发（TT）、音频视频桥接（AVB）和尽力而为（BE）队列。广泛使用的方法是在调度之前离线生成GCL配置文件，称为静态配置GCL。然而，ADAS 中存在非周期性但安全关键的事件触发 (ET) 流，例如交通事故或警报。 ET 流由紧急事件触发，需要及时响应。换句话说，ET 流应该在 TT 流之后立即传输。静态配置的GCL无法为ET流提供及时的调度，因为其重新配置所需的时间明显长于配置​​ET流所需的时间。在本研究中，我们提出了一种动态可配置的 GCL (DC-GCL)，以适应 ADAS 汽车 TSN 开关中 ET 流的传输。我们在DC-GCL中设计了一种动态ET流传输解决方案，而不影响TT流传输。 DC-GCL 将 ET 流定义为第二高优先级，允许其抢占 AVB 和 BE 队列的传输。我们设计了一个动态GCL调度窗口来计算ET流的队列和传输时间。我们进一步提出了一种动态 GCL 配置算法来初始化 GCL 并启用动态 GCL 修改。我们构建了一个由汽车级开发板组成的基于 TSN 的 ADAS 原型平台，并在该平台中部署了 DC-GCL。实验结果表明，DC-GCL显着提高了GCL在不同ADAS场景下的可扩展性。与静态配置的GCL相比，DC-GCL使TT流端到端时延降低40.9%~53.6%，ET流端到端时延降低81.1%~82.3%。

items.title: TCAD Editorial.
items.abstract: IEEE Xplore, delivering full text access to the world's highest quality technical literature in engineering and technology. | IEEE Xplore
items.abstract_zh: IEEE Xplore，提供对世界上最高质量的工程和技术技术文献的全文访问。 | IEEE探索

items.title: Memristive Neural Network Circuit Implementation of Model Predictive Control for Trajectory Tracking.
items.abstract: model predictive control (MPC), a receding-horizon optimal control strategy, predicts system dynamics and optimizes control actions to satisfy performance and constraint requirements, making it widely adopted in control engineering. However, contemporary computing platforms struggle to meet the real-time and energy-efficient demands of MPC’s computationally intensive matrix operations, stemming from high data movement overhead, extensive circuit resource utilization, and frequent data conversions inherent in physical system interfaces. These challenges collectively impose significant latency and power penalties, particularly critical as systems grow in complexity and scale within the big-data era. This article introduces a zeroing neural network (ZNN)-based memristive neural network circuit that directly converges the MPC error function to zero in one step. Theoretical analysis and simulations validate the closed-loop circuit’s stability. For a 32-step prediction horizon, evaluations show that the control output from the proposed circuit matches the ideal digital MPC solution with 96.0% accuracy. The circuit also executes at least an order of magnitude faster and consumes less energy than traditional MPC solvers. Additionally, the circuit successfully accelerates the proposed trajectory tracking algorithm, achieving 98.0% accuracy compared with the theoretical result and 318.2× improvement in computation time compared to CPU.
items.abstract_zh: 模型预测控制（MPC）是一种后退最优控制策略，可以预测系统动态并优化控制行为以满足性能和约束要求，使其在控制工程中得到广泛采用。然而，由于高数据移动开销、广泛的电路资源利用率以及物理系统接口固有的频繁数据转换，当代计算平台难以满足 MPC 计算密集型矩阵运算的实时和节能需求。这些挑战共同带来了显着的延迟和功耗损失，随着大数据时代系统的复杂性和规模不断增长，这一点尤其重要。本文介绍了一种基于归零神经网络（ZNN）的忆阻神经网络电路，该电路可以一步直接将 MPC 误差函数收敛到零。理论分析和仿真验证了闭环电路的稳定性。对于 32 步预测范围，评估表明所提出电路的控制输出与理想数字 MPC 解决方案匹配，准确度为 96.0%。与传统 MPC 求解器相比，该电路的执行速度至少快一个数量级，并且消耗的能量更少。此外，该电路成功地加速了所提出的轨迹跟踪算法，与理论结果相比，准确率达到了 98.0% 318.2× 与 CPU 相比，计算时间有所改善。

items.title: InstantGR: Scalable GPU Parallelization for 3-D Global Routing.
items.abstract: Global routing plays a crucial role in electronic design automation (EDA), serving not only as a means of optimizing routing but also as a tool for estimating routability in earlier stages, such as logic synthesis and physical planning. However, these scenarios often require global routing on unpartitioned large designs, posing unique challenges in scalability, both in terms of runtime and design size. To tackle this issue, this article introduces useful techniques for parallelizing large-scale global routing that can significantly increase parallelism and thus reduce runtime. We also propose a new flexible layer transition technique to increase the flexibility and routing quality of directed acyclic graph (DAG) routing. Building upon these techniques, we have developed an open-source GPU-based global router that achieves state-of-the-art results in the latest ISPD’24 Contest benchmarks, thereby showcasing the effectiveness of our methods.
items.abstract_zh: 全局布线在电子设计自动化 (EDA) 中发挥着至关重要的作用，不仅可以作为优化布线的手段，还可以作为逻辑综合和物理规划等早期阶段估计可布线性的工具。然而，这些场景通常需要在未分区的大型设计上进行全局布线，这在运行时和设计规模方面都对可扩展性提出了独特的挑战。为了解决这个问题，本文介绍了用于并行化大规模全局路由的有用技术，这些技术可以显着提高并行性，从而减少运行时间。我们还提出了一种新的灵活层转换技术，以提高有向无环图（DAG）路由的灵活性和路由质量。基于这些技术，我们开发了一种基于 GPU 的开源全局路由器，它在最新的 ISPD’24 竞赛基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，从而展示了我们方法的有效性。

items.title: FPGA-Friendly Architecture of Processing Elements for Efficient and Accurate Quantized CNNs.
items.abstract: An field-programmable gate array (FPGA)-friendly processing element (PE) based on the small logarithmic floating point (SLFP) format is proposed. The proposed PEs not only support inner product but also perform various nonlinear activation functions (NAFs), which consume 674 × LUT6s and 7 × digital signal processing blocks (DSPs) and operate at 450MHz in a pipeline manner for Zynq-7000. In addition, as the distribution of SLFP numbers is not uniform, this brief revises the weight decay scheme in the quantization aware training process to explore the optimum quantized weights. Compared with INT8-based design, the proposed method balances the resource usage between look-up tables and DSPs. The accuracy loss of the quantized model based on the 8-bit SLFP is also small due to the high dynamic range of SLFP format. Moreover, since the proposed method can support different NAFs, this brief improves the quantized model accuracy by selecting an appropriate NAF from Swish, GELU, Mish and PReLU. Compared to the baseline (parameters are FP32, NAF is ReLU), the accuracy of quantized ResNet-50 and MobileNet is increased by 2.65% and −0.33%.
items.abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于小对数浮点（SLFP）格式的现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）友好的处理元件（PE）。所提出的 PE 不仅支持内积，还执行各种非线性激活函数 (NAF)，消耗 674 × LUT6 和 7 × 数字信号处理模块 (DSP) 并以管道方式在 450MHz 下运行Zynq-7000。此外，由于SLFP数的分布不均匀，本文修改了量化感知训练过程中的权重衰减方案，以探索最佳的量化权重。与基于 INT8 的设计相比，所提出的方法平衡了查找表和 DSP 之间的资源使用。由于SLFP格式的高动态范围，基于8位SLFP的量化模型的精度损失也很小。此外，由于所提出的方法可以支持不同的 NAF，因此本文通过从 Swish、GELU、Mish 和 PReLU 中选择合适的 NAF 来提高量化模型的准确性。与基线（参数为 FP32，NAF 为 ReLU）相比，量化的 ResNet-50 和 MobileNet 的准确率分别提高了 2.65% 和 -0.33%。

items.title: HyperMetric: Efficient Hyperdimensional Computing With Metric Learning for Robust Edge Intelligence.
items.abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) is emerging as an efficient and robust computing paradigm that has strong resilience to various types of errors. The error robustness nature of HDC makes it a good match for error-prone memory systems. However, the mechanisms behind HDC’s robustness are not fully understood. In this work, we propose HyperMetric, a framework to train highly robust and hardware-friendly HDC models. We found that HDC’s error resilience is driven by Hamming distance margin between hypervectors. Based on this, we propose HyperMetric training that is based on metric learning in order to optimize for high robustness. The experiments show that HyperMetric trained HDC models deliver up to 17× larger Hamming distance margin and up to 14.3% accuracy gain. We accelerate HyperMetric trained models using ReRAM. As compared to state-of-the-art HDC algorithms OnlineHD and HyDREA, HyperMetric ReRAM accelerator is >20% more accurate for computing-in-memory (CIM) errors and >10% more accurate for bit errors even in the face of variations. Furthermore, HyperMetric hardware is 35% more accurate in comparison with existing tinyHD and GENERIC accelerators in the face of 3× ReRAM resistance variance, and 20% more accurate with bit error rate (BER) of up to 20% due to voltage scaling while keeping a good balance between area, power, and processing latency.
items.abstract_zh: 超维计算（HDC）正在成为一种高效、鲁棒的计算范式，对各种类型的错误具有很强的恢复能力。 HDC 的容错特性使其非常适合易出错的存储系统。然而，HDC 稳健性背后的机制尚不完全清楚。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HyperMetric，一个用于训练高度稳健且硬件友好的 HDC 模型的框架。我们发现 HDC 的错误恢复能力是由超向量之间的汉明距离裕度驱动的。基于此，我们提出基于度量学习的 HyperMetric 训练，以优化高鲁棒性。实验表明，经 HyperMetric 训练的 HDC 模型可提供高达 17× 更大的汉明距离裕度，并高达准确度提高 14.3%。我们使用 ReRAM 加速 HyperMetric 训练模型。与最先进的 HDC 算法 OnlineHD 和 HyDREA 相比，即使面对变化，HyperMetric ReRAM 加速器对于内存计算 (CIM) 错误的准确度也提高了 20% 以上，对于位错误的准确度也提高了 10% 以上。此外，在面对 3× $ 时，HyperMetric 硬件的准确度比现有的tinyHD 和 GENERIC 加速器高出 35% ReRAM 电阻变化，由于电压缩放，精度提高 20%，误码率 (BER) 高达 20%，同时在面积、功耗和处理延迟之间保持良好平衡。

items.title: Super-Vth Standard Cells With Improved EDP: Design and Silicon Validation in 65nm LP CMOS.
items.abstract: The ever-increasing computational load and shrinking power budget have accentuated the need for energy-efficient operation of edge devices. In this article, a combination of static CMOS logic and hybrid pass transistor logic with Static CMOS output (HPSC), which has no floating or weak nodes and is thus as robust to noise as static CMOS logic, is used for designing toolchain-compatible super- \text V_\text th standard cells. Optimized HPSC variants of a 2/3-input XOR cell, a 2/3-input XNR cell, a half adder cell, a full adder cell, and two variants of a 1-bit multiply–accumulate combinational cell are presented in a commercial 65nm low-power CMOS technology. Measurements of test structures based on ring oscillators and dummy path techniques show an average frequency and average energy-delay product improvement of up to 30.3% and 32.5%, respectively, at typical conditions. The proposed cells’ superior performance compared to the commercially available standard cells is also highlighted in terms of propagation delay, leakage, and dynamic power consumption. This shows a promising approach for foundries or other commercial entities to improve digital design performance to about half a technology node at no additional cost.
items.abstract_zh: 不断增加的计算负载和不断缩小的功率预算凸显了对边缘设备节能运行的需求。在本文中，静态 CMOS 逻辑和具有静态 CMOS 输出 (HPSC) 的混合通道晶体管逻辑的组合（HPSC）没有浮动节点或弱节点，因此与静态 CMOS 逻辑一样对噪声具有鲁棒性，用于设计工具链兼容的超级 \text V_\text th 标准单元格。 2/3 输入 XOR 单元、2/3 输入 XNR 单元、半加器单元、全加器单元的优化 HPSC 变体以及 1 位乘法累加组合单元的两个变体采用商用 65 nm 低功耗 CMOS 技术。基于环形振荡器和虚拟路径技术的测试结构的测量表明，在典型条件下，平均频率和平均能量延迟乘积分别提高了 30.3% 和 32.5%。与商用标准单元相比，所提出的单元的优越性能还体现在传播延迟、泄漏和动态功耗方面。这为铸造厂或其他商业实体展示了一种有前途的方法，可以将数字设计性能提高到大约一半的技术节点，而无需额外成本。

items.title: Gas Leakage Detection Using YOLO Accelerator Based on ZYNQ.
items.abstract: Infrared imaging is a valuable technology for gas leakage detection due to its high sensitivity, long detection range, and high efficiency. Conventional target detection methods depend on manually extracting image features, which often leads to limited accuracy, low adaptability, and slow detection speeds. Deep learning technology offers a potential solution to these challenges; however, the increasing depth of neural networks imposes significant computational demands, posing challenges to real-time detection. This article presents a compact and energy-efficient gas detection system, implemented with a ZYNQ platform and an infrared camera. We propose a ZYNQ-based convolution accelerator to enhance gas plume detection from images captured by the infrared camera. Operating at a clock frequency of 130 MHz, the accelerator is capable of reaching a peak performance of 37.44 Gop/s, with power consumption of only 4.12 W. The system achieves a processing speed of 0.235 s per image, enabling real-time gas leakage detection.
items.abstract_zh: 红外成像因其灵敏度高、检测范围远、效率高而成为气体泄漏检测的一种有价值的技术。传统的目标检测方法依赖于人工提取图像特征，往往导致精度有限、适应性低、检测速度慢。深度学习技术为这些挑战提供了潜在的解决方案；然而，神经网络深度的增加带来了巨大的计算需求，给实时检测带来了挑战。本文介绍了一种紧凑且节能的气体检测系统，采用 ZYNQ 平台和红外摄像机实现。我们提出了一种基于 ZYNQ 的卷积加速器，以增强红外相机捕获的图像中的气体羽流检测。该加速器工作时钟频率为130 MHz，峰值性能可达37.44 Gop/s，功耗仅为4.12 W。系统每幅图像的处理速度为0.235 s，可实现实时气体泄漏检测。

items.title: MultiSky: Dynamic Resource Allocation Framework for High-Throughput CGRA Multitask Execution.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays (CGRAs) offer a promising balance between high performance and flexibility, yet dynamic resource allocation in multitask scenarios remains challenging due to unpredictable task creation/destruction. Existing static approaches lack flexibility, while dynamic methods suffer from high latency or limited applicability. This article presents MultiSky, a framework for CGRA multitask dynamic resource allocation, combining a hardware controller and a software premapper. The hardware controller dynamically allocates resources within hundreds of cycles by calculating tile allocation for each task via weighted averaging, and generating tile shapes using a lightweight heuristic algorithm. The software premapper employs incremental compilation to pregenerate configurations, avoiding online transformation overhead. Evaluations on a real-world multitask scenario demonstrate that MultiSky achieves 1.72× higher throughput than baselines by maintaining 82.7% average resource utilization. The framework scales efficiently with larger CGRAs and task counts, with hardware overhead decreasing to 1% for 16× 16 CGRAs. These results highlight MultiSky’s ability to balance flexibility, efficiency, and practicality in dynamic computing environments.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）在高性能和灵活性之间提供了良好的平衡，但由于不可预测的任务创建/销毁，多任务场景中的动态资源分配仍然具有挑战性。现有的静态方法缺乏灵活性，而动态方法则存在高延迟或适用性有限的问题。本文介绍了 MultiSky，这是一个 CGRA 多任务动态资源分配框架，结合了硬件控制器和软件预映射器。硬件控制器通过加权平均计算每个任务的图块分配，并使用轻量级启发式算法生成图块形状，在数百个周期内动态分配资源。软件预映射器采用增量编译来预生成配置，避免在线转换开销。对真实多任务场景的评估表明，MultiSky 通过保持比基线更高的吞吐量，实现了 1.72× 平均资源利用率82.7%。该框架可通过更大的 CGRA 和任务数量进行高效扩展， 16× 16$ 的硬件开销减少至 1% CGRA。这些结果凸显了 MultiSky 在动态计算环境中平衡灵活性、效率和实用性的能力。

items.title: DAGSIS: A DAG-Aware MAGIC-Based Synthesis Framework for In-Memory Computing.
items.abstract: This article presents a comprehensive synthesis framework, named DAGSIS, for memristor-aided logic (MAGIC)-based in-memory computing system. DAGSIS addresses the limitations of prior works, such as overlooking the benefits of MAGIC’s high fan-in capability and the impact of global properties of netlists on the scheduling of computation sequence (CS). DAGSIS achieves the optimization in two synthesis stages. In the technology-independent optimization stage, DAGSIS encourages the merging of nodes in the network to reduce circuit size, by utilizing equivalent transformation of multiplexer (MUX). In the CS scheduling stage, DAGSIS introduces two schemes for optimizing area overhead and latency, respectively. For area optimization, DAGSIS maximizes the utilization of memristive cells by erasing the expired data as early as possible. For latency optimization, DAGSIS aims to minimize erasing operations, by maximizing the number of erased cells in each epoch of filling the memory. To achieve better CS scheduling, DAGSIS introduces two design rules to guide CS scheduling, which fully considers the global attributes of circuit design, such as critical path and high fan-out nodes. Experiment results show that DAGSIS reduces the circuit size by 6.69% on ISCAS’85 benchmarks compared to ABC tool, an open-source logic synthesis framework. Compared to the state-of-the-art works, DAGSIS achieves a reduction of 40.68% and 12.67% in area overhead and erasing operations, respectively, on ISCAS’85 and EPFL benchmarks. The improvements are further translated into the reduction in energy consumption by up to 13.7%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个名为 DAGSIS 的综合综合框架，用于基于忆阻器辅助逻辑 (MAGIC) 的内存计算系统。 DAGSIS 解决了先前工作的局限性，例如忽略了 MAGIC 高扇入能力的优势以及网表全局属性对计算序列 (CS) 调度的影响。 DAGSIS 在两个综合阶段实现了优化。在技​​术无关的优化阶段，DAGSIS通过利用多路复用器（MUX）的等效变换，鼓励网络中的节点合并以减少电路尺寸。在CS调度阶段，DAGSIS引入了两种方案，分别优化区域开销和延迟。为了区域优化，DAGSIS 通过尽早擦除过期数据来最大化忆阻单元的利用率。对于延迟优化，DAGSIS 旨在通过在填充存储器的每个时期中最大化擦除单元的数量来最小化擦除操作。为了实现更好的CS调度，DAGSIS引入了两种设计规则来指导CS调度，充分考虑了电路设计的全局属性，例如关键路径和高扇出节点。实验结果表明，与开源逻辑综合框架ABC工具相比，DAGSIS在ISCAS’85基准上减少了6.69%的电路尺寸。与最先进的作品相比，DAGSIS 在 ISCAS’85 和 EPFL 基准测试中，面积开销和擦除操作分别减少了 40.68% 和 12.67%。这些改进进一步转化为能耗降低高达 13.7%。

items.title: FedMT: Multitask Federated Learning With Competitive GPU Resource Sharing.
items.abstract: Federated learning (FL) nowadays involves heterogeneous compound learning tasks as cognitive applications’ complexity increases. For example, a self-driving system hosts multiple tasks simultaneously (e.g., detection, classification, and segmentation) and expects FL to retain life-long intelligence involvement. However, our analysis demonstrates that, when deploying compound FL models for multiple training tasks on a GPU, certain issues arise: as different tasks’ skewed data distributions and corresponding models cause highly imbalanced learning workloads, current GPU scheduling methods lack effective resource allocations. Therefore, existing FL schemes, only focusing on heterogeneous data distribution but runtime computing, cannot practically achieve optimally synchronized federation. To address these issues, we propose a full-stack FL optimization scheme to tackle both intradevice GPU scheduling and interdevice FL coordination for multitask training. Specifically, our works illustrate two key insights in this research domain: Competitive resource sharing is beneficial for parallel model executions, and the proposed concept of “virtual resource” could effectively characterize and guide the practical per-task resource utilization and allocation. In addition, architectural-level coordination improves FL performance by aligning task workloads with GPU utilization. Our experiments demonstrate that the FL performance could be significantly escalated. Specifically, we observed a 2.16× – 2.38× increase in intradevice GPU training throughput and a 2.53× – 2.80× boost in interdevice FL coordination efficiency across diverse multitask scenarios.
